summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FOMO Arena PHASE 3.5 CLAIM FLOW + PHASE 4 ECONOMY SYNC. MyPositions component successfully integrated into Profile page with proper wallet connection states. All navigation tabs working correctly. Backend XP API endpoints fully functional.
